// 01 — About

Who I Am

Hello, my name is Raghav Patidar. I am a computer science student with a strong interest in programming, software development, and problem-solving.

I enjoy learning new technologies and building projects that help me improve my technical skills. I have experience working with programming languages such as C++ and Python, and web technologies like HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

This portfolio showcases my projects, technical skills, and learning journey in the field of computer science. My goal is to continuously grow as a developer and turn logic into meaningful products.

// 02 — Projects

What I've Built

PROJECT_01

Student Report Card System

Jun 2025

A console-based system with features to add, update, search, delete, and display student records, including automatic grade and percentage calculation. Implements full CRUD operations with persistent file-based storage.

C++ OOP File Handling CRUD
↗ View on GitHub
PROJECT_02

AirQuality Insight & Trends

Jul 2024

Collected, cleaned, and analyzed AQI datasets using Python to uncover patterns and seasonal trends. Performed statistical analysis, correlation studies, and time-series visualizations. Automated a script to process raw data and generate analytical reports.

Python Pandas Matplotlib Seaborn
↗ View on GitHub

Object Oriented Programming Using C++

Jun 2025 — Jul 2025
Lovely Professional University

  • Improved debugging, logical thinking, and application design skills through mini-projects and guided assignments.
